hero.badge: Restaurants, salons, contractors, clinics — the AI that answers while you work
hero.title3: on the phone, WhatsApp, email, and your website
hero.description: A dinner reservation on a Friday night, a question on a Sunday, a call you miss mid-rush: Aevia answers in your place, qualifies the request, and flags you when it matters. You focus on your work — not your phone.

products.section_sub: A website that brings you customers, an AI that answers them, an audit that protects it all. Separately or together.
products.launch_tagline: A site that brings you customers — live in 7 days
products.launch_desc: A credible online presence by the end of the week, without the back-and-forth of a traditional agency. Pick a style from our templates, we style it to match your brand and put it live — or generate everything in 60 seconds with the AI builder.
products.security_desc: Is your site vulnerable? Get a scored PDF report with all security flaws and actionable recommendations. No installation required.
products.inbox_tagline: Every call picked up, every message answered — even at night
products.inbox_desc: A customer calling on a Saturday night, an Instagram DM at midnight, an email on Sunday morning: someone answers, qualifies the request, and lets you know if it's worth your time. You stop missing things, even when you're closed.
products.inbox_f2: Answers within seconds, day and night

templates_section.title: 3 types of sites, delivered turnkey
templates_section.desc: I customize the template of your choice with your content, colors, identity — and deploy it in 7 days.
templates_section.custom_q: Find your style among our themes

why.title: Why Aevia?
why.fast_desc: Site delivered in 7 days, audit in 60 seconds. No endless meetings, no agency dragging.
why.reliable_desc: Production-ready stack — Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL. The same tech as startups raising millions.
why.simple_desc: You don't need to understand the tech. You describe, we build. Guaranteed result.

cta.title: Ready to digitalize your business?
cta.desc: A website, a security audit, or an Inbox demo — let's talk in 30 minutes.
